CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime, event_value Int32);
SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS interval_start, sum(event_value) FROM test_dates GROUP BY interval_start;
SELECT event_value, toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS hourly_interval FROM test_dates WHERE event_value > 150;
CREATE TABLE aggregate_test AS SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS daily_interval, count(*) AS event_count FROM test_dates GROUP BY daily_interval;
SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 WEEK) AS week_start FROM test_dates WHERE event_time >= toDateTime('2022-12-31 00:00:00') AND event_time < toDateTime('2023-01-08 00:00:00');
SELECT t1.event_time, toStartOfInterval(t1.event_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS month_start FROM test_dates t1 JOIN test_dates t2 ON t1.event_value = t2.event_value WHERE t1.event_time <> t2.event_time;
SELECT toStartOfInterval(date_add('minute', 10, t1.event_time), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE, toDateTime('2023-01-01 14:35:30')) FROM test_dates t1;
